# YTGrowth

> YTGrowth is a YouTube analytics tool and AI YouTube channel audit platform
> for creators who want to grow without spending hours decoding dashboards.
> Positioned as a VidIQ alternative, TubeBuddy alternative, and Viewstats
> alternative, it bundles a YouTube SEO tool, thumbnail scoring, competitor
> analysis, and keyword research into one YouTube optimization tool that
> answers how to grow your YouTube channel by turning the data VidIQ and
> TubeBuddy show you into a prioritized action plan you can work through in
> an hour. Among the best YouTube tools for creators who want prescriptions,
> not raw metrics.

## What it is

YTGrowth (https://ytgrowth.io) is a SaaS platform for YouTube creators
who want to grow their channel without spending hours interpreting
analytics. Connect your YouTube channel via Google OAuth and the platform
performs a 10-dimension audit covering traffic sources, audience
demographics, posting patterns, click-through rate, retention, engagement
quality, content strategy, SEO discovery, thumbnail health, and competitor
positioning. The output is a ranked list of fixes — not another dashboard
you have to interpret.

The product positions itself as "the AI that audits your channel like a
$500/hour consultant." It targets the gap between raw-analytics tools
(VidIQ, TubeBuddy, Social Blade) and personal coaching, by automating the
interpretation step that most creators outsource.

## Who it's for

- Solo YouTubers (1K–100K subscribers) trying to grow without a team.
- Multi-channel agencies managing 3–10 client channels in one workspace.
- Faceless / niche-channel operators optimising for reliable growth.
- Coaches and consultants using it as a diagnostic on client channels.
- Creators who are tired of vanity-metric dashboards and want to know
  what to do next.

## Core features

- **Channel Audit** — A 10-dimension AI audit of your channel: traffic
  sources, device split, audience demographics, posting cadence, CTR,
  retention curves, engagement quality, content-strategy fit, SEO
  discovery, thumbnail health, and benchmarking against your real
  competitors. Returns a prioritized action list with severity tags.

- **Competitor Analysis** — You pick 2–10 channels in your niche.
  YTGrowth analyzes their last 30+ uploads and surfaces the patterns
  that explain why they're outperforming you (titles, thumbnails,
  posting times, topic mix, hook style).

- **SEO Studio** — Title and description optimizer that scores against
  search demand, keyword fit, hook strength, length, and competitor
  patterns. Suggests rewrites you can apply with one click via the
  YouTube Data API.

- **Thumbnail IQ** — Two-layer thumbnail scoring: an algorithmic CTR
  prediction plus a vision model checking text contrast, face/object
  placement, emotion, and composition against high-performing
  thumbnails in your niche.

- **Keyword Explorer** — Search volume, competition score, and ranking
  difficulty for any topic. Surfaces low-competition / high-intent
  keywords that creators in your niche are missing.

- **Video Ideas** — Generates ideas based on your channel's existing
  performance patterns, trending topics, and competitor gaps. Each idea
  comes with a working title, target keyword, and rationale.

- **Title Optimizer** — Quick A/B-style scoring of title variants against
  search and click-through models.

- **Post-Publish Review** — Within 24 hours of a new upload, a focused
  audit of how that specific video is performing relative to your
  channel baseline and what to fix on the next one.

- **Weekly Reports** — Automated email digest of channel performance,
  upcoming opportunities, and what to publish next.

- **Multi-channel support** — Manage up to 10 channels under one account
  on the Agency plan, with pooled credits.

## Pricing

Free tier:
- 1 channel · 3 lifetime AI analyses · limited Thumbnail IQ ·
  view-only Keyword Explorer · no Competitor Analysis.

Solo — $19/month or $190/year (~$15.83/month equivalent):
- 3 channels · 20 AI analyses/month · full SEO Studio · full Keyword
  Explorer · Title Optimizer · Video Ideas · Competitor Analysis
  (2 rivals) · standard Thumbnail IQ.

Growth — $49/month or $490/year:
- 5 channels · 50 AI analyses/month · everything in Solo plus weekly
  email reports · Competitor Analysis (5 rivals) · increased
  Thumbnail IQ credits.

Agency — $149/month or $1,490/year:
- 10 pooled channels · 150 AI analyses/month · everything in Growth
  plus priority support · Competitor Analysis (10 rivals) · maximum
  Thumbnail IQ credits.

Lifetime variants of each tier are available as one-time purchases
(Solo $149, Growth $169, Agency $949). Top-up packs (20 / 60 / 150
analyses) sit on top of any plan and never expire.

## Affiliate program

30% recurring commission on every payment for as long as a referred
customer stays subscribed. 30-day cookie window, $50 payout minimum,
monthly via PayPal or bank transfer. Open to all creators, no approval
required, instant link generation. Sign up at
https://affiliates.ytgrowth.io.

## How it differs from VidIQ and TubeBuddy

VidIQ and TubeBuddy show you data and let you interpret it. YTGrowth runs
an AI audit on top of the same data and tells you specifically what to
change, in what order, and why. The Channel Audit alone replaces the kind
of report a YouTube growth consultant would charge $300–$500 for.

## Guides and articles

In-depth guides on growing, optimizing, and monetizing a YouTube
channel. Full archive at https://ytgrowth.io/blog.

- [Best Microphone for YouTube: Every Setup and Budget (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/best-youtube-mic): The best microphone for YouTube is the one that fits your setup, not the one with the longest spec sheet.
- [Copyright-Free Music for YouTube: The Best Free and Royalty-Free Sources (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/copyright-free-music): The safest free and royalty-free music for YouTube, plus the part most lists skip: how Content ID really works, why "no copyright" tracks from random channels still…
- [What Is a Good Click-Through Rate on YouTube? CTR Benchmarks for 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-ctr): A good YouTube CTR is roughly 4 to 10 percent, with most channels averaging 4 to 6.
- [How to Get Sponsorships on YouTube in 2026 (Even With a Small Channel)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-sponsorships): You do not need 100,000 subscribers to land a brand deal.
- [How Much Do YouTube Shorts Pay in 2026? The Real Numbers (and Why the Payout Isn't the Point)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-shorts-pay): YouTube Shorts pay roughly $0.03 to $0.10 per 1,000 views, about $30 to $100 per million.
- [The Best Time to Post on YouTube in 2026 (and Why Your Own Data Beats Any Chart)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/best-time-to-post): The best times to post videos and Shorts, broken down by day, content type, and region, plus the one thing every other guide buries: how to read your own YouTube…
- [Faceless YouTube Channel Ideas: The Niches That Pay and How to Stay Monetized in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/faceless-youtube-channel-ideas): Most faceless channel lists give you ideas but never tell you which ones earn $15 CPM and which earn $2, how to validate a niche before you commit, or how to stay…
- [The Best Chrome Extensions for YouTube Creators in 2026 (and How to Choose Them)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/chrome-extensions-for-youtube): The Chrome extensions worth installing in 2026, grouped by what creators really do: keyword research, competitor and outlier analysis, recording, and workflow.
- [YouTube RPM Explained: What It Means, What Affects It, and How to Increase It](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-rpm): What YouTube RPM means, why it moves, the niches that pay 3 to 10x more than average, and the five levers that lift the number in your Revenue tab.
- [Best Free YouTube Keyword Research Tools (2026 Comparison)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-keyword-research-tools): The best free YouTube keyword research tools in 2026, the data each one delivers, the paid options worth paying for, and a workflow that turns research into publish…
- [Best YouTube Analytics Tools: A Complete Guide for Creators and Brands](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-analytics-tools): The best YouTube analytics tools in 2026, organized by the gap each fills: competitor data, keyword research, A/B testing, auditing.
- [YouTube Analytics Explained: Every Tab and Metric That Matters](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-analytics): A complete guide to YouTube Studio analytics: every tab, the metrics that drive growth, reading traffic sources, and checking the public stats of any channel.
- [YouTube Description Template: How to Write Video and Channel Descriptions That Work](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-description-template): Your description is the second most important metadata after the title.
- [How to Write a YouTube Title That Ranks and Gets Clicked](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-title): A YouTube title has two jobs: tell the algorithm what the video is about and give the viewer a specific reason to click.
- [How to Get More Views on YouTube: 11 Strategies That Work in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/more-views-on-youtube): Most creators stuck at low view counts have a problem in one specific part of the YouTube view funnel.
- [YouTube Channel Audit: A Step-by-Step Guide to Finding What Is Holding Your Channel Back](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-channel-audit): Most channels that are not growing have one specific fixable problem they have never identified because they have never looked for it systematically.
- [TubeBuddy vs vidIQ: Which YouTube Growth Tool Is Right for You in 2026?](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/tubebuddy-vs-vidiq): TubeBuddy and vidIQ are not direct substitutes.
- [Why Is My YouTube Channel Not Growing? 10 Reasons and How to Fix Each One](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-channel-not-growing): Most creators trying to fix a stalling channel start with the wrong problem.
- [YouTube Trends: How to Find What's Trending and Use It Before It Peaks (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-trends): How to find YouTube trends and trending topics early, validate real search demand, and publish before the topic saturates.
- [Google AdSense for YouTube: How It Works, Setup, and Getting Paid (2026)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/google-adsense-youtube): How Google AdSense for YouTube works: setup and linking, the approval and tax steps, when you get paid, and the mistakes that get accounts suspended.
- [vidIQ Review (2026): Is It Worth It, and the Free Alternative](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/vidiq-review): An honest vidIQ review for 2026: what the extension does, what the plans cost, where users hit billing and accuracy issues, and how to cover the same jobs free.
- [YouTube Video Ideas for Beginners: 10 Ideas That Work With Zero Subscribers](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-video-ideas): Reaction videos, collabs, and polls need an audience you do not have yet.
- [YouTube CPM Rates: The Best Niches and How to Maximize Your Ad Revenue](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-cpm): What YouTube CPM is and how it differs from RPM, the average rates by category, the niches that pay 10x more, and the levers that lift your CPM without changing niche.
- [YouTube Tags for Views: The Best Tags to Use and How to Find Them](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-tags): YouTube tags are a ranking signal, not a formality.
- [YouTube Tag Finder: How to Find the Right Keywords for More Views](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-tag-finder): Picking tags on what feels relevant leaves your video competing for the wrong audience or missing search traffic entirely.
- [YouTube Shorts Tagging: How to Use Hashtags and Metadata for More Views](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/shorts-tagging): Zero views on a Short is usually a tagging problem, not content.
- [Video Tagging Best Practices: How to Signal Relevance to YouTube and Google in One Workflow](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/video-tagging): Tags are not a keyword dump at the bottom of an upload form.
- [The YouTube Competitor Analysis Method That Finds Algorithm Winners](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-competitor-analysis): Studying what rivals post is the surface layer.
- [Beyond the Red Arrow: 22+ YouTube Thumbnail Frameworks That Force the Click](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-thumbnail-ideas): Low CTR on a strong video is rarely the algorithm.
- [Stop Guessing Clicks: 6 Best AI Thumbnail Testers to Predict CTR Before You Upload](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/thumbnail-tester): Thumbnail CTR prediction used to mean uploading and waiting.
- [Stop Getting Ignored: The Beginner's Guide to Designing High-CTR YouTube Thumbnails](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-maker): A technically acceptable thumbnail still gets ignored if it is psychologically invisible.
- [YouTube Thumbnail Size in 2026: The Specs, Safe Zones, and Mobile Rules That Drive Clicks](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-thumbnail-size): A thumbnail can be perfectly designed and completely invisible on a mobile screen because the dimensions were wrong.
- [Beyond the 4,000-Hour Wall: A Strategic Guide to Accelerating YouTube Watch Time (Without Buying Fake Views)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-watch-hours): Shorts views, paid traffic, and bought hours do not count.
- [The Profitable YouTube Niche Guide: How to Find Your High-CPM Angle in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-niche): The highest-paying YouTube niches in 2026, ranked by CPM and RPM, plus the faceless playbook and the six-step process to validate a niche before you film a single video.
- [The Business of YouTube: How to Launch a Channel and Monetize from Day One (Not Day 180)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-as-a-business): AdSense is the last revenue stream you should be waiting for, not the first.
- [The 2026 YouTube Channel Optimization Blueprint: Balancing Algorithm Searchability with Human Clickability](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-channel-optimization): Channel optimization in 2026 runs on two engines.
- [Beyond the Scroll: A 5-Step Guide to Mastering the YouTube Shorts Algorithm in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-shorts-algorithm): Shorts is push-based, not pull-based.
- [The 2026 YouTube Growth Blueprint: How to Engineer Views and Subscribers From Zero](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/grow-youtube-channel): Channels that grow are not the most talented.
- [YouTube Algorithm 2026: How Discovery Works (Stop Gaming the Bot)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-algorithm): How the YouTube algorithm works in 2026: the three discovery engines, the three metrics that move the needle, and the myths to stop chasing.
- [What is YouTube SEO? The Complete Guide to Ranking Videos in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/what-is-youtube-seo): YouTube SEO turns good content into found content: keyword research, on-page metadata, engagement signals, and channel authority.
- [The 2026 YouTube SEO Blueprint: Engineering Retention and CTR to Dominate the Algorithm](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-seo-best-practices): Cross a 6% CTR and 50% Average View Duration and YouTube starts pushing your video through Browse and Suggested.
- [The 5-Pillar YouTube SEO Tool Stack to Dominate the Algorithm (And the Secret CTR Stack)](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/seo-tools-for-youtube): Most creators are still optimizing YouTube like it is 2018.
- [How to Monetize Your YouTube Channel in 2026](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/youtube-partner-program): Most monetization guides skip Tier 1 entirely.
- [Stop Searching for Generators: The 6-Step Roadmap to 1,000 Free YouTube Subscribers](https://ytgrowth.io/blog/free-subs-on-youtube): Subscriber generators get channels banned.
